CustomField.description: Semicolon-delimited list of NEPA_GIS_Layer__mdt DeveloperName keys whose positive intersection triggers creation of a permit instance of this type. Evaluated by NEPA_Permit_Record_Creator GIS bridge (e.g., NWI_WETLANDS triggers CWA Section 404; EPA_TRIBAL_LANDS triggers NHPA Section 106). Multiple keys mean ANY match triggers the permit.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: GIS layer keys that trigger this permit type (e.g., NWI_WETLANDS; WILD_SCENIC_RIVERS). Any positive match creates a permit instance record.
CustomField.label: GIS Trigger Layer Keys
